meta.title: Yonsei Baro Dental Network — Clear Aligner & Smile Design in Korea
meta.description: Korea's leading clear aligner and no-prep smile design network. Invisalign Purple Diamond Provider. 14 branches nationwide.

hero.label: Yonsei Baro Dental Network · Korea
hero.subtitle: Your clear aligner and smile design treatment starts with {highlight}. Korea's most trusted orthodontic network, now speaking your language.
hero.note: No commitment · Response within 24h · EN · JP · ZH · TH
hero.card1Desc: Invisalign Purple Diamond Provider. All doctors trained at Yonsei University — Korea's most rigorous dental program.
hero.card2Desc: Thousands of patients from Japan, China, Thailand and beyond. Full consultation in your language — no Korean needed.
hero.card3Desc: With Invisalign, you don't need monthly visits. We plan your entire treatment around your schedule — come every 3–6 months. Once a year is even possible.

trust.multilingualSub: EN · JP · ZH · TH — no Korean needed

twoPath.label: Who Is This For?
twoPath.title: Two types of patients.
twoPath.subtitle: Whether you already live in Korea or you're planning a visit — we've built a process that works around your life.

pathA.title: Living in Korea
pathA.desc: You're already here — no flights, no planning. Just come in and let's get started. Our multilingual team makes the whole process easy from day one.
points: Consultation in English, Japanese, Chinese, or Thai
14 branches — find one close to where you live
Standard visit schedule — no special protocol needed

pathB.title: Planning a trip
pathB.desc: Combine your Korea visit with world-class orthodontic care. We plan treatment around your travel schedule — as little as one or two visits a year.
points: Send photos first — we assess online before you travel
Treatment timeline planned around your visits
Recommended every 6 months — once a year possible
Coordinator guides you from first contact to final result

treatment.label: What We Do
treatment.title: Two treatments.
treatment.subtitle: Every case at Yonsei Baro is about the result — functional, aesthetic, and lasting.

aligner.name: Invisible Orthodontics
points: Custom 3D plan — from scan to delivery
Complex cases, retreatment, extraction cases welcome
Schedule designed around your life — not fixed monthly visits
Cases published through Global Gallery internationally

laminate.name: Smile Redesign
points: No drilling, no grinding — fully reversible
Natural translucency with digital smile design
Not all cases qualify — we assess your photos first
Combinable with clear aligner for full smile redesign

team.label: Our Team
team.title: The doctors
team.desc: Every Yonsei Baro orthodontist completed training at Yonsei University and Severance Dental Hospital — Korea's most rigorous academic background. A shared standard across all 14 branches.
team.quote: "Every branch shares the same clinical standard. Wherever you visit in Korea, you're in the same hands."

network.label: Our Network
network.title: 14 branches.
network.desc: Wherever your Korean trip takes you — our branches cover Seoul, Incheon, Gyeonggi, Daejeon and beyond. Follow-up care stays consistent across all locations.

contact.label: Get Started
contact.title: Start with a free
contact.desc: Send us your photos and we'll assess your case — no commitment, no pressure. We respond in your language within 24 hours.
contact.responseNote: We respond within 24 hours · Available in EN, JP, ZH, TH
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in your details — attach photos if you have them.
contact.placeholderMessage: e.g. I live in Tokyo and plan to visit Korea in summer. I've had braces before and want to redo...
contact.uploadDesc: Front smile · Side profile · Upper & lower arch
contact.privacy: Your information is used solely for consultation purposes and will not be shared with third parties. By submitting you agree to our privacy policy.

footer.tagline: Korea's most trusted clear aligner and no-prep smile design network — 14 branches nationwide, built for patients who expect the best.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Yonsei Baro Dental Network. All rights reserved.
